title: TaxDox AI Golden Fixture
description: Expected-output schema for a single labeled evaluation fixture. One fixture = one document with its expected classification + field values.

file.description: Path to the source document under eval/golden/fixtures/.

documentType.description: Expected classification, or null if the fixture is intentionally unclassifiable.

name.description: Field name matching the DocTypeDef in src/lib/constants.ts.

tolerance.description: Allowed numeric delta for currency/amount fields.

mustDetect.description: Field names that must appear in the output even if their value isn't strictly graded.
